behavior_summary: This NPC (CARDAS) is a sorcerer-type actor that delegates virtually all interaction and AI reactions to shared sorcerer and spell subsystems rather than implementing unique logic in-script.
U8P_CARDAS::look handles the player 'U8P_CARDAS::look' (examine) action by calling a sorcerer-specific U8P_CARDAS::look handler and then suspending.
U8P_CARDAS::use delegates the 'U8P_CARDAS::use' interaction to a sorcerer-specific routine and then suspends.
U8P_CARDAS::enterFastArea and U8P_CARDAS::leaveFastArea respond to trigger-area entry/exit by calling sorcererDetectPlayer and sorcererResetActivity respectively (start/stop AI engagement).
U8P_CARDAS::cast forwards a numeric parameter to the combat spell subsystem (SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop), likely to perform or control a specific spell-casting action.
notable_control_flow: All script entry points are processes that immediately delegate to external subsystem routines and then suspend; there is no branching or local dialog/menu logic in this script.
Trigger-based handlers (U8P_CARDAS::enterFastArea/U8P_CARDAS::leaveFastArea) map directly to player-detection and activity-reset routines, indicating AI engagement is managed externally.
Spell behavior is not implemented in-script: U8P_CARDAS::cast simply forwards its parameter to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop and yields.
open_questions: What exact behavior SORCERER::func039C and SORCERER::func05EC perform (description, talk, or other visual/audio reactions) — the script only delegates to them.
What the numeric parameter to U8P_CARDAS::cast encodes precisely (spell id, index, or flags) — inferred but not confirmed from this script alone.
Are there any global flags or shared state modified by the external sorcerer/spell subsystems that affect broader quest/AI flow (none are written in this script).

main_function.name: U8P_CARDAS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player examining the NPC by delegating to a sorcerer-specific U8P_CARDAS::look handler and yielding.
entry_conditions: Player uses the 'U8P_CARDAS::look' or examine action on the NPC (engine invokes a process-type 'U8P_CARDAS::look' handler).

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::look
function_map.role: examined-by-player handler; delegates to sorcerer U8P_CARDAS::look routine

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::use
function_map.role: handles 'U8P_CARDAS::use' interactions by delegating to sorcerer U8P_CARDAS::use routine

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: trigger-area entry handler; calls sorcererDetectPlayer to initiate engagement

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: trigger-area exit handler; calls sorcererResetActivity to stop/reset engagement

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::cast
function_map.role: forwards a numeric parameter into the combat spell loop to perform spell behavior

function_map.name: SORCERER::func039C
function_map.role: sorcerer-specific U8P_CARDAS::look/visual handler invoked by U8P_CARDAS::look

function_map.name: SORCERER::func05EC
function_map.role: sorcerer-specific U8P_CARDAS::use/interact handler invoked by U8P_CARDAS::use

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer
function_map.role: external AI routine to detect the player and begin sorcerer activity

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity
function_map.role: external AI routine to reset or stop sorcerer activity

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop
function_map.role: combat spell runtime loop used by U8P_CARDAS::cast to implement spells

external_calls.purpose: Perform the sorcerer-specific response to being examined (description/visual state); script delegates entirely to this routine.
Handle 'U8P_CARDAS::use' interaction (inspect/talk/special behavior) via the sorcerer subsystem; script yields after calling it.
Detect player entry into the NPC's fast area and initiate appropriate AI/reactive behavior.
Reset or stop AI activity when the player leaves the NPC's trigger area.
Run the combat spell loop using the forwarded numeric parameter (likely a spell id) to perform spell-casting behavior.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This NPC (CARDAS) is a sorcerer-type actor that delegates virtually all interaction and AI reactions to shared sorcerer and spell subsystems rather than implementing unique logic in-script.
